name: Virtual Fairways
about: Virtual Fairways is an indoor golf simulator venue in Columbus featuring three top-of-the-line simulator bays. The facility provides a dual-purpose environment, combining a high-tech golf simulation experience with a lounge and bar area. It caters to a wide range of golfers, from serious players seeking a winter practice space to casual groups looking for entertainment. The venue operates with a primary booking model for bay rentals, also offering party packages, memberships, and organized leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Three top-tier golf simulators for a premium on-course experience
Full facility rental option that includes all bays and a lounge with a bar tab
Versatile atmosphere suitable for both focused practice and social gatherings

food_and_drink.notes: Food availability not explicitly mentioned in the content.
Bar is available; party package includes a $100 bar tab.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The content does not specify whether club rentals are available or if customers must bring their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The content does not explicitly state if outside food and drinks are permitted, but the venue has a full bar and offers party packages that include a bar tab.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard booking is for 2 hours, which is the duration for renting the entire place (all 3 bays). The time to play 18 holes on an individual bay is not specified.

faq.question: Is Virtual Fairways kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The content does not explicitly mention if children are allowed or if there are any kid-specific amenities or policies.
